tasks.title: Sanity Regression Bringup
tasks.description: Need to finish the bringup of all sanity cases in the development process.

subtasks.title: MX100 sanity cases bringup
subtasks.description: Run and fix MX100 sanity set.

tasks.title: AP3 VIP UVM Agent Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor AP3 VIP agents to support configurable address width and burst types. Align with latest RTL interface changes for APB3.

progress_updates.text: Cumulative Effort is all logged hours that are not in the report window — i.e. date_added before From or after To (same as taskEffortOutsideRangeMainAttributed / subtaskEffortOutsideRange). New Effort stays From–To inclusive. So cumulative = “spent so far excluding new effort in this range,” and Cumulative + New = total spent (for dated entries).

subtasks.title: Update APB driver for 32/64-bit
subtasks.description: Extend driver to support configurable data width.

subtasks.title: Add burst sequence support
subtasks.description: Implement INCR and WRAP burst sequences.

tasks.title: RTL Lint Cleanup for Top-Level
tasks.description: Fix all RTL lint violations in top-level integration. Focus on width mismatches and combinational loops in clock domain crossing.

tasks.title: ASIC Synthesis Timing Closure
tasks.description: Close timing on MX100 block. Multiple corners (BC/WC). Target 800 MHz. Fix hold violations in scan chain.

tasks.title: VIP Regression Environment Setup
tasks.description: Set up nightly regression for AP3 and AXI VIPs. Integrate with CI and add coverage exclusions for legacy code.

subtasks.title: Jenkins pipeline for VIP
subtasks.description: Create nightly job for AP3 and AXI.

tasks.title: RTL Power Gating Review
tasks.description: Review and document power gating strategy for all always-on vs switchable domains. Align with PD team for implementation.

tasks.title: AP3 Protocol Checker Enable
tasks.description: Enable and tune AP3 protocol checkers in VIP. Add assertions for PREADY/PENABLE timing and wrap boundary.

tasks.title: RISC-V Core Integration Verification
tasks.description: Verify RISC-V core integration with fabric. Run full system tests and debug any AXI protocol or cache coherency issues.

tasks.title: DFT Scan Insertion Review
tasks.description: Review scan insertion results for MX100. Fix DRC and verify shift/capture patterns with ATPG.

tasks.title: UVM Register Model Update for AP3
tasks.description: Update UVM register model to match RTL address map and new AP3 control registers. Regenerate from RDL.

subtasks.title: RDL to UVM reg gen
subtasks.description: Run reg gen from RDL and integrate.

tasks.title: Gate-Level Simulation Bringup
tasks.description: Bring up gate-level sim for MX100 with SDF. Correlate with RTL and run smoke tests.

tasks.title: AP3 VIP Coverage Closure
tasks.description: Drive code and functional coverage for AP3 VIP to 95%. Add cross-coverage for burst types and alignments.

subtasks.title: Exclude legacy code
subtasks.description: Add coverage exclude for legacy blocks.

tasks.title: RTL Code Freeze Documentation
tasks.description: Document RTL code freeze process and branching strategy for tape-out. Update wiki and run knowledge share.

tasks.title: AXI VIP Stress Tests
tasks.description: Add stress tests for AXI VIP: back-pressure, narrow transfers, out-of-order responses. Run in nightly.

tasks.title: Clock Domain Crossing Audit
tasks.description: Audit all CDC paths in top-level. Document synchronizers and add waiver for verified false paths.

subtasks.title: CDC tool run and waivers
subtasks.description: Run CDC tool and add waivers for false paths.

subtasks.title: Power Validation
subtasks.description: Complete the power validation of the task.

tasks.title: Formal Property Sign-Off for AP3
tasks.description: Run formal property proof for AP3 bridge. Sign off req-grant and data path properties.

progress_updates.text: Scope reduced; deferred to next quarter.
